'''Sarrah''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Togorian/Legends|Togorian]] who served as a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
